title: New secret
pickHint: Choose a type of secret to create, or generate a one-off password.
customHint: Any path and content you choose
generateHint: Copy a random password without saving
firstLineHint: First line of the content becomes the password.
templateHint: A .pass-template applies to this location — what's shown below is what will be stored.
saveBlocked: Save blocked: the remote failed signature verification under Enforce mode. Review in History, then pull to sync and retry.
remoteChanged: The remote changed since you reviewed this — rechecking…
